narrative:
Oxford Twp township has 1,045 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.9 percentage points.
